---
title: "Session 1: Introduction to LLMs & NLP Tasks"
subtitle: "Day 1 · Introduction & First Experience (1-1)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 1: Introduction to LLMs & NLP Tasks

## 📋 Agenda

- What LLMs are & how they fit linguistic analysis
- The NLP tasks we'll tackle in this course
- Course overview & self-introductions

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# What are LLMs?

## What are LLMs?

<!-- to be added -->

# NLP tasks for linguistic analysis

## NLP tasks for linguistic analysis

<!-- to be added -->

# Course overview & introductions

## Course overview & introductions

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
